title: Prompt engineering: pros and cons
excerpt: A practical look at where prompt engineering gives real leverage, where it becomes brittle, and why architecture still matters around the model.

title: Why architecture still matters in the AI era
excerpt: The model is not the product. Durable software value still comes from architecture, workflow, distribution, trust, and execution quality.

title: Building an AI product factory mindset
excerpt: A repeatable AI product process needs idea selection, interface design, evaluation loops, data discipline, and a bias for shipping.
